sb_prompt: DOES YOUR FAMILY KEEP A MONTHLY BUDGETCAN YOU GIVE A GENERAL DESCRIPTION OF YOUR PROCEDURES
raw_output:
Participants: ParticiapntA (PA), ParticipantinB (PB)

PA: Hello!, I was wondering if you could give me any advice on creating a family budget?

PB: Sure thing, we definitely keep a monthly budget. It helps us stay organized and financially secure. What kind of help are you looking for exactly?
PA : Well , i am trying to get my finances together after graduation . How did u start doing that ?
Pb: We started by sitting down as a family and making a list of all our expenses, including things like rent/mortgage payments, utilities, groceries, transportation costs, etc. Then we set up categories for each type of expense and assigned a certain amount of money to be spent on them each month. This way, we can see where our money is going and make adjustments accordingly.
PA ; That sounds like a good idea but how do you manage your savings and emergency funds?
P
